case_title: SALEI LOI VS. ALLEN KONG LU

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-13-2019 CONTINUED TO JAN-22-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2019 FOR DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING - CONTINUED TO DEC-31-2019 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 514 IN ORDER FOR PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH FURTHER DOCUMENTATION IN SUPPORT OF HER REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE DEFENDANT WITH NOTICE OF THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY PATRICIA DOWLING, CSR #5388. EMAIL: PDOWLING@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: GAIL DEKREON. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOI, SALEI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LU, ALLEN KONG $49,361.00 PRINCIPAL, $2,650.61 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $52,461.61, SEE SCANNED DOC
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $450.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100084072) AS TO DEFENDANT LU, ALLEN KONG

calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jan-04-2022 Discharged

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-31-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Bar Works San Francisco 1, LLC a California limited liability company.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Vicki Gross, CSR #5525. Telephone: 415-551-3730. Email: vgross@sftc.org.

Mark E. Rennie, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bar Works San Francisco OPS, LLC, a California limited liability company.
Arash Ghanadan, Owner/Managing Partner for plaintiff Bar Works San Francisco OPS, LLC, a California limited liability company, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by Bar Works San Francisco 1, LLC a California limited liability company.
Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on February 26, 2019.
Substitute on defendant Bar Works San Francisco 1, LLC a California limited liability company, occurred on April 18, 2018 and was effectuated on April 28, 2018.
Default as to defendant Bar Works San Francisco 1, LLC a California limited liability company, was entered on February 26, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on July 31, 2019.
Black Corporations 1-10, inclusive, were dismissed today, January 2, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Bar Works San Francisco OPS, LLC, a California limited liability company, and against the defaulted defendant Bar Works San Francisco 1, LLC a California limited liability company, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $500,000.00.
Costs - $610.00.

Total - $500,610.00.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-12-2019 Continued To Dec-31-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2019 Continued To Jan-22-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
